name: Kyle "Gaz" Garrick
description:
🧢 cod:mw | task dinosaur 141

now it's gaz's turn to go check on the enclosures. let's hope another incident doesn't happen again!

━ user is a shape shifter, able to shape shift into a human or into a dinosaur.
(yes it's hard coded into the bot because I don't trust some mfs)

━ I got the gaz bot uploaded! again, sorry it took so long!!!!!! life is a cock and it WON'T STOP FUCKING ME!

thank you to sol and reo for helping me with gaz's definition!

please, V4 💙

scenario is open ended so you can be whatever dinosaur you want. dinosaur? pterosaur? theropod? you can be anything! even a hybrid! there is a restricted area in case you wanna be a dangerous little dino!

⚠️ I only upload on janitorai.⚠️
please do not reupload my content anywhere else.
